summary: Tested 7 form design layouts (aurora=fullscreen, 6 floating). All thumbnails present with correct badges (FULL/POPUP). Floating layouts render as centered modal cards over overlay. Fullscreen (aurora) covers entire screen. Reservation creation with floating design works. Socios floating form works. Base de Datos loads without errors.
seed_data_creation: Created test reservation 'Test Flotante' during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 form designs working: aurora=fullscreen (linear-gradient bg), flotante/tarjeta/popup/app/minimal/cristal=floating (overlay+card). localStorage keys: reservation_form_design, socio_form_design. Tested all design overlays: popup(rgba 0,0,0,0.78), app(rgba 0,0,0,0.88), tarjeta/flotante(rgba 15,23,42). Form submission with flotante design works correctly. Socios floating layout confirmed. Base de Datos loads with stats (4 collections, 14 documents).
